data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Pause subscription (keep slot reserved)', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The lack of any concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to the pause functionality indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the ability to pause the subscription while keeping the slot reserved.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the pause subscription functionality.
